text.title: ICP Fit Scorecard Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every per-customer ICP scoring run must enforce. Hard rules; designed to prevent vanity bands, no-action runs, and unevidenced scores.

rule.statement: Every customer scorecard scores exactly 5 signals with fixed weights summing to 100: pain_match (0-25), budget_fit (0-20), urgency (0-15), product_fit (0-25), accessibility (0-15). No bonus categories.

rationale.source: ICP-research practice; B2B SaaS scorecard literature

rule.rationale: Free-form additions inflate scores and let everyone clear the keep bar. Locked weights enforce a real distribution.

rule.statement: Total score routes to a band: KEEP ≥70 (invest, founder-touch), NURTURE 40-69 (default flow, no extra invest), REMOVE <40 (sunset offer or polite no within 30 days).
rule.rationale: Without fixed thresholds, founders drift kept-list upward over time. Locked bands force action.

rule.statement: Every signal score carries a 1-sentence evidence note citing a specific artefact (ticket id, transcript line, dashboard metric, contract clause). No unevidenced signals.
rule.rationale: LLMs cheerfully invent fit scores; evidence anchors make the scorecard falsifiable.

rule.statement: Re-score the full active book once per quarter. Compare against prior scorecard; flag >15-point movers (positive or negative) for narrative review.

rationale.source: Customer-lifecycle research; quarterly business review cadence

rule.rationale: Annual scoring is too lagging; weekly is too noisy. Quarterly catches real signal shifts.

rule.statement: Every REMOVE row triggers a defined action within 30 days: sunset email + refund offer + grace period, OR documented exception with reviewer name and reason.
rule.rationale: A scorecard without action is a vanity exercise; mandating action within 30 days converts scoring into outcome.

rule.statement: After scoring, publish the band histogram + median score in the founder's internal log (or build update). Shape of distribution is the actual ICP signal.
rule.rationale: A single median hides the distribution; histogram shows where the long tail of REMOVEs lives and informs persona refinement.

rule.statement: When preconditions in Applies-If hold and no Skip-If trigger applies, walk the 6-step procedure end-to-end and run the validator before declaring the scorecard ready.

rationale.source: F-066 v3 B5.6 — mandatory run leaf

rule.rationale: Decision-tree run leaf for canonical execution path.

rule.statement: Skip this methodology when the Applies-If preconditions are not met OR any Skip-If disqualifier holds.

rationale.source: F-066 v3 B5.6 — mandatory skip leaf

rule.rationale: Decision-tree skip leaf for non-applicable inputs.
